project.name: Hero: Debugging Auth Lock Race Conditions

data.label: Style
data.name: Noir Comic Book
data.description: Noir comic book illustration style. Heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading, cel-shaded shadows. Hand-drawn graphic novel aesthetic with bold outlines. Muted palette with selective color pops. Stylized, not photorealistic. No text, watermarks, speech bubbles, or white borders. Edge-to-edge composition filling the entire frame.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style. Tangled electrical wires and circuit paths in blacks and grays, with selective color pops of cyan and magenta. One wire glows, showing the path of a signal blocked by a locked gate. High contrast, technical aesthetic, no text or labels.

data.label: Avoid
data.content: Never include Lemmy Kilmister, Motörhead imagery, metal bassists in leather jackets, or self-portraits of rock legends. No generic punk rockers with mohawks unless specifically requested. Focus on the actual subject matter described in the scene.
